---
title: "Keys · By Component"
pdf: false
---

Find an article by the kind of component you are working with.

## narrative-primitives
*craft abstractions of story/voice: beat, scene, POV, trope, oracle, reveal*

- [Mixed-Ability Groups & Universal Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/mixed-ability-groups-and-universal-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Cluing & Fairness](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/extraction-indexing-and-meta-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Information Architecture](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Teaching Through Play](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [A Taxonomy of Genre Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/a-taxonomy-of-genre-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Audience & Age-Targeting](../articles/story-character-voice/audience-and-age-targeting.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Character Voice](../articles/story-character-voice/character-voice.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Conflict Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/conflict-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Dialogue Craft](../articles/story-character-voice/dialogue-craft.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Diegetic Design](../articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Emotional Beats & Investment](../articles/story-character-voice/emotional-beats-and-investment.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Environmental Storytelling & Setting as Character](../articles/story-character-voice/environmental-storytelling-and-setting-as-character.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Exposition & Subtext](../articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Fantasy Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/fantasy-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Heist & Caper Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Historical Fiction](../articles/story-character-voice/historical-fiction.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Horror Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/horror-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](../articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Mystery & Detective Fiction](../articles/story-character-voice/mystery-and-detective-fiction.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [NPC Craft & Voicing](../articles/story-character-voice/npc-craft-and-voicing.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](../articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Prompt Design in Solo Journaling](../articles/story-character-voice/prompt-design-in-solo-journaling.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Prose Patterns & Point of View](../articles/story-character-voice/prose-patterns-and-point-of-view.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Romance & Relationships](../articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Science Fiction Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](../articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [The Journal as Artefact](../articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Tropes, Archetypes & Variations](../articles/story-character-voice/tropes-archetypes-and-variations.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Voice & Register Consistency](../articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Worldbuilding Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](../articles/structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Campaign Arc Shapes](../articles/structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Endings & Structural Closure](../articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Episodic & Serialised Structure](../articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](../articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Nonlinear Narrative Structures](../articles/structure-pacing/nonlinear-narrative-structures.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](../articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Scene & Sequel in Interactive Fiction](../articles/structure-pacing/scene-and-sequel-in-interactive-fiction.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Scene Structure & Transitions](../articles/structure-pacing/scene-structure-and-transitions.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Session Pacing & Energy Management](../articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](../articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Distributing Narrative Authority](../articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Encounter & Challenge Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/encounter-and-challenge-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Playbook Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Progress Clocks & Faction State](../articles/systems-mechanics/progress-clocks-and-faction-state.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [TTRPG Format Taxonomy](../articles/systems-mechanics/ttrpg-format-taxonomy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## state-and-resource-trackers
*quantified state + resolution dials: flag, meter, track, win-condition, skill-check*

- [Accessibility in Live & Interactive Games](../articles/players-social-dynamics/accessibility-in-live-and-interactive-games.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Cooperative vs Adversarial Formats](../articles/players-social-dynamics/cooperative-vs-adversarial-formats.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Faction Design & Asymmetric Objectives](../articles/players-social-dynamics/faction-design-and-asymmetric-objectives.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](../articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Parallel Team Architectures](../articles/players-social-dynamics/parallel-team-architectures.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](../articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Team Splitting Strategies](../articles/players-social-dynamics/team-splitting-strategies.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [A Taxonomy of Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/a-taxonomy-of-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Information Architecture](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Teaching Through Play](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](../articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Audience & Age-Targeting](../articles/story-character-voice/audience-and-age-targeting.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Dialogue Craft](../articles/story-character-voice/dialogue-craft.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Horror Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/horror-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](../articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Prompt Design in Solo Journaling](../articles/story-character-voice/prompt-design-in-solo-journaling.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Romance & Relationships](../articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Branching Narrative Craft](../articles/structure-pacing/branching-narrative-craft.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Endings & Structural Closure](../articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Episodic & Serialised Structure](../articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](../articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](../articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](../articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Scope, Scale & Branching Depth](../articles/structure-pacing/scope-scale-and-branching-depth.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Time Loop Patterns](../articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](../articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Decision Space & Choice Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/decision-space-and-choice-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Deckbuilders](../articles/systems-mechanics/deckbuilders.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Digital Gating & State](../articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](../articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Encounter & Challenge Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/encounter-and-challenge-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Euro vs Ameritrash: The Two Design Poles](../articles/systems-mechanics/euro-vs-ameritrash-the-two-design-poles.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [IF Mechanics & Procedural Rhetoric](../articles/systems-mechanics/if-mechanics-and-procedural-rhetoric.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Mechanical Resolution Types](../articles/systems-mechanics/mechanical-resolution-types.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Moves & the Fiction-Mechanic-Fiction Loop](../articles/systems-mechanics/moves-and-the-fiction-mechanic-fiction-loop.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Oracle & Solo-Play Resolution](../articles/systems-mechanics/oracle-and-solo-play-resolution.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Playbook Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Prep Economy](../articles/systems-mechanics/prep-economy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Replayability](../articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Safety Systems as Mechanical Layer](../articles/systems-mechanics/safety-systems-as-mechanical-layer.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Solo Modes](../articles/systems-mechanics/solo-modes.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [System vs Setting](../articles/systems-mechanics/system-vs-setting.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [TTRPG Format Taxonomy](../articles/systems-mechanics/ttrpg-format-taxonomy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Theme-Mechanism Integration](../articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Turn Structure & Action Economy](../articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## roles-and-social-frame
*people-parts + the social/safety contract: faction, hidden-role, safety-tool, gm-role*

- [Accessibility in Live & Interactive Games](../articles/players-social-dynamics/accessibility-in-live-and-interactive-games.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Bleed, Aftercare & Debriefing](../articles/players-social-dynamics/bleed-aftercare-and-debriefing.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Cooperative vs Adversarial Formats](../articles/players-social-dynamics/cooperative-vs-adversarial-formats.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](../articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Faction Design & Asymmetric Objectives](../articles/players-social-dynamics/faction-design-and-asymmetric-objectives.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [GM Role Models & Stances](../articles/players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](../articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [One-on-One Scene Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/one-on-one-scene-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Parallel Team Architectures](../articles/players-social-dynamics/parallel-team-architectures.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Player Types & Casting](../articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Pre-Game Workshop Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/pre-game-workshop-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](../articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Safety Tools as Design Layer](../articles/players-social-dynamics/safety-tools-as-design-layer.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Spectator-Friendly Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Team Sizes & the Bottleneck Problem](../articles/players-social-dynamics/team-sizes-and-the-bottleneck-problem.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Team Splitting Strategies](../articles/players-social-dynamics/team-splitting-strategies.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [The Session Zero Playbook](../articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Trust, Conformity & Social Pressure](../articles/players-social-dynamics/trust-conformity-and-social-pressure.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Cluing & Fairness](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Teaching Through Play](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](../articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](../articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [A Taxonomy of Genre Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/a-taxonomy-of-genre-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Audience & Age-Targeting](../articles/story-character-voice/audience-and-age-targeting.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Canon Management](../articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Heist & Caper Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Historical Fiction](../articles/story-character-voice/historical-fiction.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](../articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Mystery & Detective Fiction](../articles/story-character-voice/mystery-and-detective-fiction.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Romance & Relationships](../articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Science Fiction Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Tropes, Archetypes & Variations](../articles/story-character-voice/tropes-archetypes-and-variations.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Campaign Arc Shapes](../articles/structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Distributing Narrative Authority](../articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Replayability](../articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Social Performance Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/social-performance-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [TTRPG Format Taxonomy](../articles/systems-mechanics/ttrpg-format-taxonomy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Theme-Mechanism Integration](../articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## structural-primitives
*abstract graph/flow: node, branch, gate, hub, bottleneck, thread, clock*

- [Mixed-Ability Groups & Universal Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/mixed-ability-groups-and-universal-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Spectator-Friendly Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Team Sizes & the Bottleneck Problem](../articles/players-social-dynamics/team-sizes-and-the-bottleneck-problem.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Team Splitting Strategies](../articles/players-social-dynamics/team-splitting-strategies.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [The Session Zero Playbook](../articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [A Taxonomy of Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/a-taxonomy-of-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Clue Sequencing & Chains](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/clue-sequencing-and-chains.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Hint Systems & Recovery](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Information Architecture](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Puzzle Hunt Craft](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/puzzle-hunt-craft.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [The Aha Moment](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](../articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Canon Management](../articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Conflict Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/conflict-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Dialogue Craft](../articles/story-character-voice/dialogue-craft.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Diegetic Design](../articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Heist & Caper Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Horror Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/horror-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [NPC Craft & Voicing](../articles/story-character-voice/npc-craft-and-voicing.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Tropes, Archetypes & Variations](../articles/story-character-voice/tropes-archetypes-and-variations.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Worldbuilding Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](../articles/structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Branching Narrative Craft](../articles/structure-pacing/branching-narrative-craft.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Escape Room Topologies](../articles/structure-pacing/escape-room-topologies.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](../articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](../articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Parallel Threads & Convergence](../articles/structure-pacing/parallel-threads-and-convergence.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](../articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Scene & Sequel in Interactive Fiction](../articles/structure-pacing/scene-and-sequel-in-interactive-fiction.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Scope, Scale & Branching Depth](../articles/structure-pacing/scope-scale-and-branching-depth.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Time Loop Patterns](../articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [West Marches & the Open-Table Format](../articles/structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Decision Space & Choice Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/decision-space-and-choice-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Digital Gating & State](../articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Moves & the Fiction-Mechanic-Fiction Loop](../articles/systems-mechanics/moves-and-the-fiction-mechanic-fiction-loop.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Prep Economy](../articles/systems-mechanics/prep-economy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Progress Clocks & Faction State](../articles/systems-mechanics/progress-clocks-and-faction-state.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## procedures-and-protocols
*run-time routines: hint systems, debrief, calibration, reset, verification*

- [Accessibility in Live & Interactive Games](../articles/players-social-dynamics/accessibility-in-live-and-interactive-games.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Bleed, Aftercare & Debriefing](../articles/players-social-dynamics/bleed-aftercare-and-debriefing.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](../articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [GM Role Models & Stances](../articles/players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Host Roles & the Host-Cannot-Play Problem](../articles/players-social-dynamics/host-roles-and-the-host-cannot-play-problem.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Mixed-Ability Groups & Universal Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/mixed-ability-groups-and-universal-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [One-on-One Scene Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/one-on-one-scene-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Player Types & Casting](../articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Pre-Game Workshop Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/pre-game-workshop-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](../articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Safety Tools as Design Layer](../articles/players-social-dynamics/safety-tools-as-design-layer.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [The Session Zero Playbook](../articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Trust, Conformity & Social Pressure](../articles/players-social-dynamics/trust-conformity-and-social-pressure.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/extraction-indexing-and-meta-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Hint Systems & Recovery](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Puzzle Hunt Craft](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/puzzle-hunt-craft.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Self-Resolving Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [The Aha Moment](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Cue Management & GM Station](../articles/space-props-materiality/cue-management-and-gm-station.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Materials, Durability & Reset](../articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Emotional Beats & Investment](../articles/story-character-voice/emotional-beats-and-investment.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Historical Fiction](../articles/story-character-voice/historical-fiction.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](../articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](../articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [The Journal as Artefact](../articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Voice & Register Consistency](../articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Endings & Structural Closure](../articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Episodic & Serialised Structure](../articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](../articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Session Pacing & Energy Management](../articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Time Loop Patterns](../articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](../articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Digital Gating & State](../articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Distributing Narrative Authority](../articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Replayability](../articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Safety Systems as Mechanical Layer](../articles/systems-mechanics/safety-systems-as-mechanical-layer.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Social Performance Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/social-performance-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Turn Structure & Action Economy](../articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## paper-artefacts
*documents/handouts/reference texts: clue-text, codex, map, story-bible, feelie*

- [Faction Design & Asymmetric Objectives](../articles/players-social-dynamics/faction-design-and-asymmetric-objectives.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Host Roles & the Host-Cannot-Play Problem](../articles/players-social-dynamics/host-roles-and-the-host-cannot-play-problem.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](../articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Player Types & Casting](../articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [The Session Zero Playbook](../articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Ciphers & Codes](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Clue Sequencing & Chains](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/clue-sequencing-and-chains.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Cluing & Fairness](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/extraction-indexing-and-meta-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Information Architecture](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Artefact Design & Document Production](../articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](../articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](../articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Physical Clue Formats](../articles/space-props-materiality/physical-clue-formats.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Physical vs Digital Puzzle Artefacts](../articles/space-props-materiality/physical-vs-digital-puzzle-artefacts.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Canon Management](../articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Diegetic Design](../articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Emotional Beats & Investment](../articles/story-character-voice/emotional-beats-and-investment.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](../articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Science Fiction Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](../articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [The Journal as Artefact](../articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Voice & Register Consistency](../articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Worldbuilding Patterns](../articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](../articles/structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Campaign Arc Shapes](../articles/structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](../articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Nonlinear Narrative Structures](../articles/structure-pacing/nonlinear-narrative-structures.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Scene Structure & Transitions](../articles/structure-pacing/scene-structure-and-transitions.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [West Marches & the Open-Table Format](../articles/structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](../articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Playbook Design](../articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Prep Economy](../articles/systems-mechanics/prep-economy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [System vs Setting](../articles/systems-mechanics/system-vs-setting.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Theme-Mechanism Integration](../articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## physical-parts
*tangible game pieces: dice, cards, tokens, board, miniatures, decks*

- [Spectator-Friendly Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Fabrication & Sourcing](../articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](../articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Materials, Durability & Reset](../articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Physical Clue Formats](../articles/space-props-materiality/physical-clue-formats.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [NPC Craft & Voicing](../articles/story-character-voice/npc-craft-and-voicing.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Prompt Design in Solo Journaling](../articles/story-character-voice/prompt-design-in-solo-journaling.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [The Journal as Artefact](../articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Boardgame Mechanism Vocabulary](../articles/systems-mechanics/boardgame-mechanism-vocabulary.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Deckbuilders](../articles/systems-mechanics/deckbuilders.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Distributing Narrative Authority](../articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](../articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Euro vs Ameritrash: The Two Design Poles](../articles/systems-mechanics/euro-vs-ameritrash-the-two-design-poles.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Mechanical Resolution Types](../articles/systems-mechanics/mechanical-resolution-types.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Replayability](../articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Safety Systems as Mechanical Layer](../articles/systems-mechanics/safety-systems-as-mechanical-layer.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Social Performance Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/social-performance-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Solo Modes](../articles/systems-mechanics/solo-modes.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [System vs Setting](../articles/systems-mechanics/system-vs-setting.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## locks-and-concealment
*locks, containers, caches, ciphers/inks that gate or conceal*

- [Ciphers & Codes](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Hint Systems & Recovery](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Self-Resolving Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [The Aha Moment](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Artefact Design & Document Production](../articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Digital Props](../articles/space-props-materiality/digital-props.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Fabrication & Sourcing](../articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](../articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Lock Taxonomy](../articles/space-props-materiality/lock-taxonomy.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Materials, Durability & Reset](../articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Physical Clue Formats](../articles/space-props-materiality/physical-clue-formats.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Physical vs Digital Puzzle Artefacts](../articles/space-props-materiality/physical-vs-digital-puzzle-artefacts.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](../articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## electronics-and-digital
*powered/networked/scannable: QR/NFC, app, screen, sensor, timer, server*

- [Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](../articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Ciphers & Codes](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Self-Resolving Puzzles](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Cue Management & GM Station](../articles/space-props-materiality/cue-management-and-gm-station.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Digital Props](../articles/space-props-materiality/digital-props.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Physical vs Digital Puzzle Artefacts](../articles/space-props-materiality/physical-vs-digital-puzzle-artefacts.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [QR & NFC Patterns](../articles/space-props-materiality/qr-and-nfc-patterns.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Science Fiction Conventions](../articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](../articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Session Pacing & Energy Management](../articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd) · Structure & Pacing
- [Progress Clocks & Faction State](../articles/systems-mechanics/progress-clocks-and-faction-state.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics
- [Turn Structure & Action Economy](../articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd) · Systems & Mechanics

## set-dressing-and-environment
*sensory/spatial environment: lighting, soundscape, scent, props, costume*

- [Parallel Team Architectures](../articles/players-social-dynamics/parallel-team-architectures.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Spectator-Friendly Design](../articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd) · Players & Social Dynamics
- [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](../articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd) · Puzzles, Clues & Information
- [Artefact Design & Document Production](../articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Fabrication & Sourcing](../articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Materials, Durability & Reset](../articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](../articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd) · Space, Props & Materiality
- [Diegetic Design](../articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Environmental Storytelling & Setting as Character](../articles/story-character-voice/environmental-storytelling-and-setting-as-character.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Exposition & Subtext](../articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
- [Prose Patterns & Point of View](../articles/story-character-voice/prose-patterns-and-point-of-view.qmd) · Story, Character & Voice
